newtonx_ideal_buyer_profiles: VP/Director of Market Research — ongoing research budgets, repeat buyers
VP/Director of Product Marketing — competitive positioning, buyer personas, messaging validation
VP/Director of Strategy — market sizing, market entry, competitive landscape for strategic planning
Director of Competitive Intelligence — continuous competitor monitoring, win/loss analysis
Head of Customer Insights — customer journey, satisfaction, retention research
Senior Product Managers — user research, product-market fit validation, market sizing
scoring_signals: Role fit: does this title typically commission B2B research?
Tenure recency: recently hired = building a function = more likely to need new vendors
Team growth: job postings signal expanding research appetite
Consulting background: ex-McKinsey/BCG/Bain prospects already value structured research
Competitive pressure: teams in crowded markets need ongoing competitive intelligence
Proximity to existing stakeholders: warm intro possible = higher conversion probability
Budget authority: VP+ titles or P&L-owning divisions = can approve $50K+ engagements
Division growth: fast-growing business units have expanding budgets
project_types: Expert Consultations (1-on-1 video calls with verified professionals)
